reviews.comment:
No puede ser que para opción sin gluten te ofrezcan galletas de arroz.
Cientos de personas paran a diario
Son un desastre, encima te dicen " traete el tuper" cuando preguntas si tienen algo sin gluten.
Pónganse las pilas, ah pero opción "veggie" tienen.
😒

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that they offer rice cakes as a gluten-free option. Hundreds of people stop by every day. They're a disaster, and on top of that, they tell you to "bring your own container" when you ask if they have anything gluten-free. They need to get their act together. Oh, but they do have a "veggie" option.

😒

reviews.comment:
El ACA de GARAYALDE, es el ACA de GARAYALDE. Parada obligada en cientos de kilómetros. Muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
The GARAYALDE ACA is the GARAYALDE ACA. A must-stop for hundreds of kilometers. Very good service.

reviews.comment:
Una estación en medio de la nada con precios relativamente altos, la atención puede mejorar. Si no queda otra pueden utilizar sus servicios.

(Translated by Google)
A station in the middle of nowhere with relatively high prices; the service could be better. If there's no other option, you can use their services.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los chicos. Siempre pasas para comprar o estirar los pies asiq agradecidos siempre con la buena atención en plena pampa.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very helpful. We always stop by to buy something or stretch our feet, so we're always grateful for the great service right in the middle of the pampas.
